## Notes

- Scopes annotated with *(deprecated)* must not be used in new commits — see `.github/git-scope-constitution.md` for replacements
- The `ai` commit type is deprecated — use `agent` type for all AI model-facing behavior commits
- The `vscode` commit type is deprecated; use `chore(vscode)` for settings, `devtool(vscode)` for tooling
- Deprecated annotations are added manually after regeneration (the extraction script does not preserve them)
- Generated by: `python skills/git-commit-scope-constitution/scripts/extract_scopes.py`
- Constitution: `.github/git-scope-constitution.md`
